posts.name: Badge
posts.tagline: AI agents collect peer reviews to generate proof of work
posts.description: Badge gives an AI agent that collects peer reviews to build proof of work. For job seekers - The agent connects to your contacts, requests anonymous reviews from your past colleagues, and builds a verified, portable trust score. score. For hiring managers - Badge gives you a 30 second reference checks on candidates, collecting authentic feedback from their actual coworkers to replace unreliable, AI-generated resumes and LinkedIn Recommendations.

posts.name: Katalyst
posts.tagline: The AI agent that works your Salesforce Pipeline
posts.description: Katalyst is the AI sales agent for teams on Salesforce. Hang up a call and it's already done: notes summarized, records created, fields updated, follow-up drafted, next step set. It runs 24/7, reading every call, email, and calendar, surfacing the right signals, prepping you for each meeting, and prompting you to act: follow up here, this one’s slipping. What's new: AI Resolution on every account, meeting recorder, hygiene scores, deal patterns. Built for enterprise sales teams.

posts.name: Scribble Network
posts.tagline: The product that makes AI recommend your brand
posts.description: Your customers ask AI before they ask Google, and most brands have no idea whether they show up or lose to a competitor. Every other tool hands you a visibility score and stops there. Scribble does the whole loop: audit where you're invisible across every AI engine, create content that closes the gap, and amplify it through 50,000 creators who only get paid when AI cites them. A gap report won't win customers. Being the cited answer will.

posts.name: Dupely
posts.tagline: The trust layer for online shopping
posts.description: Most shopping tools chase coupons. Dupely tackles trust. Online shopping is full of manipulation: artificial price drops, fake reviews, paid influencers, and sketchy white label sellers reselling the same product at a markup. DupeScore finds identical products for less. Trust This Price flags fake savings using 90 days of price history. Seller badges show you who's actually credible. Now on iOS, Android, and Chrome. Dupely is the trust layer online shopping has been missing.

posts.name: Mira
posts.tagline: AI moderated interviews that read how people feel
posts.description: Unlike AI tools that stop at interview + transcript, Mira is a full AI researcher — plans studies, recruits globally (100M+ panel, 120 countries), runs dynamic interviews with intelligent probing, and uniquely captures what participants say AND feel via real-time facial coding, voice emotion AI, and webcam eye tracking. Extracts themes, generates insights, and produces research reports automatically. 17 patents. 70+ languages. Trusted by Unilever, Nestlé and 150+ global brands. $25M Series B.

makers.name: Sumit Singh Chauhan
makers.headline: Head of AI @ Entropik | Building Mira

posts.name: Ellis
posts.tagline: AI notes for in-person meetings
posts.description: Ellis is an AI notetaker for in-person meetings. Record your meeting, get a clean transcript with each speaker identified, then ask anything — what was decided, what you missed, how it went. No laptop. No extra hardware. Just your iPhone (or Apple Watch).

posts.name: AI Emaily
posts.tagline: Your AI inbox that writes like you + replies on autopilot
posts.description: AI Emaily is the AI-native inbox that runs like your chief of staff. It reads every message, triages what actually needs you, and quiets the noise. It drafts replies in your own voice — not generic AI text — then schedules and sends across Gmail, Outlook, and any provider from one inbox. Three modes: Manual, Copilot, Autopilot. You approve, it acts, with undo and a full audit trail on everything. Your mail is never used to train models. Start free.

posts.name: Social Fetch
posts.tagline: Social media scraper API for every major platform
posts.description: Social media scraping API for public profiles, posts, comments, videos, transcripts, and metrics from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, LinkedIn, and more. Pay-as-you-go credits, 100 free to start.

posts.name: Ogment AI
posts.tagline: Your AI coworker, in Slack. Just tag @O.
posts.description: @O is the ultimate AI coworker that lives natively in Slack. Tag @O like a colleague, to ask anything or delegate daily tasks in plain English. It connects to 1,000+ tools your business runs on, does work while you sleep, and shares memory and skills across your whole team right in Slack, on any model you choose, including your own. One-click install, and everyone is AI-enabled in under 5min, not just your power users. Zero friction, maximum adoption.

posts.name: LongCat-2.0
posts.tagline: 1.6T MoE trained entirely on AI ASICs
posts.description: LongCat-2.0 is an MIT-licensed 1.6T-parameter MoE model with ~48B active parameters, 1M context, LongCat Sparse Attention, and post-training for coding and agentic workflows. It was trained on AI ASIC superpods and integrates with Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Hermes.

posts.name: Glideo
posts.tagline: Screen recordings that edit themselves
posts.description: Glideo is a free macOS screen recorder built for product demos and dev tools. It turns raw screen recordings into polished demo videos: the camera zooms toward your clicks automatically, with no keyframing. Same automatic zoom that follows your clicks and cursor. Same polished output. Same "this looks way better than a raw screen recording" result, without a price tag. No trial. No watermark. No catch.

posts.name: Zoho Tables
posts.tagline: Smarter way to manage work and data.
posts.description: Zoho Tables is a no-code spreadsheet-database hybrid with AI brains to organise work, automate workflows, and collaborate in real time.

posts.name: Kadoink AI
posts.tagline: Gather people instantly by AI txt, video, or ringing phones
posts.description: Gather people instantly by AI txt, video, or ringing phones Tell Kadoink Who You Need. AI Gets Them Together. Say Who. Say Why. Kadoink Gathers Everyone. AI-Powered Gathering for Real-Time Communication Kadoink Finds the Best Way to Reach Your People Video, Voice, Text, Push — AI Chooses the Path Stop Chasing People. Let Kadoink AI. Your AI Gathering Engine AI That Knows Who to Reach and How Tell Kadoink the Mission. AI Handles the Outreach.

posts.name: Onlook
posts.tagline: Access your Ring cameras directly from your Mac’s menu bar.
posts.description: Bring your Ring devices to your Mac's menu bar. Live views, motion alerts, and instant replay all in one app.

makers.name: James

posts.name: Norte
posts.tagline: Get back every benefit your cards already pay for.
posts.description: Your premium cards are already paying you back in credits, points, and protection you never collect. Norte runs those benefits with you, so the value you paid for actually lands. No bank login. No card numbers. The average Norte wallet has about $2,600 a year sitting uncaptured.*

posts.name: Insight Engine
posts.tagline: AI that makes your posts smarter, not just louder
posts.description: Most AI writers just mimic your tone. Insight Engine also makes the thinking sharper. Give it a rough idea, a link, or a PDF and it researches real facts, drafts 3 angles, and scores every draft against 29 anti-slop patterns before it passes. Humanize mode fixes your ChatGPT drafts without losing the facts. Ideas page pulls fresh angles from HN, Product Hunt, and arXiv. No scheduling, no OAuth, just sharper posts, priced per credit, not subscription.

posts.name: Intervool
posts.tagline: Turn customer interviews into roadmap decisions.
posts.description: Your customer insights are probably scattered across Zoom recordings, personal notes, and Miro boards. Intervool stores those conversations and lets you structure them: pull out pain points, requests, and quotes — plus anything you define. We cluster those insights into themes and break them down by persona and segment, something no other tool does. Those themes become features you can prioritize and build a roadmap around, all within Intervool. We run the full loop.

posts.name: Kuberns
posts.tagline: The AI agent that deploys and manages your cloud
posts.description: Kuberns is an agentic AI platform that deploys your projects in minutes, unlike Vercel, Render, or Heroku, which still need manual setup. Connect your GitHub repo, click deploy, and an AI agent handles infrastructure, deployment, and cloud operations automatically. Built for developers, startups, and teams who want to ship faster, with no per-user pricing.

posts.name: Awish
posts.tagline: Secure automations you can control from Wp, Slack, Telegram
posts.description: Awish turns repetitive online work into secure, self-improving automations without code. Describe a task in chat, let Awish plan and connect the right apps with permission, then control everything from WhatsApp, Slack, or Telegram.

posts.name: Proof of Usefulness
posts.tagline: Validation System for Real World Usefulness
posts.description: HackerNoon evaluates projects based on actual human, technical, and financial adoption to answer the most important questions. Is it useful? Do people use it? Individual developers and budding startups are welcome to participate, with access to free tools that help you build and promote something meaningful. Any technology is welcome, but bigger prizes are reserved for AI and ML projects that use sponsor technologies.

posts.name: Bursora
posts.tagline: Cap your AI spend before the bill lands
posts.description: Set AI spend budgets per customer, agent, or workflow. Bursora blocks the call before it blows the cap, without routing your traffic through a proxy. One line wraps your OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or DeepSeek client. Fail-open.

posts.name: VibeDrift
posts.tagline: Stop your AI agent getting worse as your codebase grows
posts.description: AI agents get worse as your codebase grows - duplicate helpers, clashing patterns, and broken features. That's drift. VibeDrift detects it in one quick local scan and feeds your agent the context to stop creating it. Free to use, runs locally, and zero code leaves your machine.

posts.name: SocialClaw
posts.tagline: Schedule, Create, and Post to Social Media with AI Agents
posts.description: Generate, manage, schedule and post content. Not your usual social media scheduler. SocialClaw helps OpenClaw, Claude, Codex, and other AI agents connect social accounts, schedule posts, upload media, and publish from one workspace. Automatically create UGC viral worthy TikTok videos with our beta video generator. Just upload a few screenshots or a screen recording of your app, and SocialClaw generates real person UGC videos for you.

posts.name: KarmaScout
posts.tagline: Surface the best opportunities in your target communities
posts.description: A Chrome extension that surfaces the best Reddit threads to engage with and drafts replies in your voice. Free. You always post manually.

posts.name: Daily Task Pro AI

Your morning starts with one clear answer: do this first. Revenue risk emails are NEVER auto-sent. You always approve. CASA Tier 2 certified. Free 14-day trial.

posts.name: Platform

Transparent pricing, no surprise bills, and teams on their own cloud typically cut costs by around 50%. Real senior engineers in minutes, not tickets. 1,500+ apps, 13 years as a team, profitable and bootstrapped.

posts.name: Kelsa

posts.description: Kelsa brings your entire Twitter/X growth workflow into a simple Chrome side panel. It is built for creators, founders and marketers who want to grow consistently without bots, auto-replies or complicated tools. Just a better system for showing up every day.

posts.name: Pajoox
posts.tagline: Let AI assist you in the shooting process.
posts.description: Pajoox is an AI-guided portrait photography assistant designed to help you capture stunning photos effortlessly. By analyzing your real-time surroundings, it delivers tailored visual inspiration—including context-aware pose suggestions, camera angle prompts, framing ideas, and aesthetic reference samples. No more guessing, no more awkward freezing. Pajoox eliminates the "how to pose" anxiety, making it easier than ever to capture natural, photo-worthy shots.

posts.name: smart-job-match

On an Apply, you get the full pack: decision memo, tailored cover letter, optimized CV and a shareable page. Free radar scans 44,000+ DACH jobs daily. First analysis free, no subscription. German-language, DACH.

posts.name: OLO v2 (you'll love this)

V2 includes, - Improved AI styling experience - Better mirror selfie uploads and analysis and 💌 a Premium lifetime access for 1st 50 users today!! (I'm so excited when I type that) As always, I'd love to hear your thoughts, feedback, or feature requests. Every update is shaped by this community. Thank you for supporting OLO! ✨

posts.name: Influencer Studio

posts.description: Influencer Studio helps creators, brands, and agencies build consistent AI influencers, then reuse them across UGC-style videos, product shots, talking heads, ads, and social content. posts.description: Sled is native affiliate tracking for Polar.sh creators. Set up in 2 minutes, track conversions, and pay out affiliates without leaving Polar. $19/mo flat — while legacy tools charge $49–149 and still skim 2–5% off every payout. Your growth shouldn't be taxed.

posts.name: DataCrawlPro

posts.name: Voila

posts.name: Fravio

posts.name: Rheo

Integrate the SDK once, then your team owns the journey from the dashboard: design funnels on a canvas, publish changes instantly, run experiments and measure what converts without waiting for an app store review cycles.

posts.name: Sellio

If you're tired of choosing between expensive cloud plans or wrestling with self-hosting, this is the middle ground you've been waiting for.

posts.name: Rivalscope

posts.name: Rasa Intelligence

posts.name: iPulse

posts.name: BoardQ.io

posts.name: Morphic CMS

makers.name: Bayu Kurniawan

posts.description: When panic, anxiety, anger, or overwhelm hits, most apps ask you to sign up, pick a course, and read instructions first. Bao Breathe skips all that. Press once and a calm companion breathes with you — nothing to read, no account, free to start. Four modes, each tuned to a different feeling, plus a panic fast-lane that drops you into the gentlest pattern instantly. Build a small daily practice so calm comes easier next time. Nino combines a CFP, CPA and AI platform to make financial planning personalized and instant. Book a free consultation at usenino.com.

Unlike many platforms that focus only on remote jobs, sansaino also supports roles that need people on location. Next, we are building team hiring, so companies can hire complete tech teams faster across borders.

Most apps make you search and add titles one by one; we turned an hour of data entry into one photo. Your collection. Digitized. Organized. Ready to swipe. No ads, no algorithms — just your taste.

posts.tagline: A thinking canvas that compiles to the structured AI prompt.
posts.description: Structured outputs start from structured thoughts. Struppëflo is a thinking canvas that compiles itself into the brief a frontier model can actually finish in one pass. Drop your thoughts as cards. Group them into named zones. The layout becomes the prompt. No account. No lock-in. Bring your own key or run entirely in the browser. Local-first: boards live in your browser, your data never touches our servers. Free during launch. Open source (AGPL-3.0).

posts.name: Informly
posts.tagline: AI support that already knows your business
posts.description: Informly turns your existing business knowledge — help docs, past tickets, your website — into an AI agent that answers customers instantly across chat, voice, and shared inboxes. It sounds like your team because it works from your words, not generic guesses. Live the same day, no scripting or decision trees. And when it doesn't know something, it hands off cleanly to a human instead of making things up. Fast and correct, without the five-tool stack. Try it at informly.app 💚

posts.name: ReplyKit
posts.tagline: Save replies once, insert them anywhere with "//"
posts.description: Save your most-used replies and insert them into any text field by typing // — Gmail, help desks, marketplaces, forms. With short triggers (;hi), dynamic placeholders ({date}, {name}) and folders. Free up to 10 snippets; Pro unlocks unlimited + sync.

posts.name: StellarScope
posts.tagline: Daily AI briefing: what your audience feels today
posts.description: Most market research is dead star data — a snapshot of a mood that's already moved on. StellarScope reads nine live signals every morning (news, social, rates, currency, holidays, weather, cultural rhythm) and lands a plain-English briefing in your inbox: what your audience feels today, what it means for your specific brand, and one thing to ship before 9am. Calibrated to your product, persona and voice. 7-day free trial; early-access pricing locked in while you stay subscribed.

posts.name: Strata
posts.tagline: Know before you go. Every trail, one safety check.
posts.description: You've got the trail picked. But is the avalanche danger creeping up? Is there smoke? Is the river too high to cross? Will your phone go dark for 6 miles? Strata answers all of it in one look - so you spend your morning hiking, not doomscrolling forecasts. 🏔️

posts.description: Read It Aloud turns any PDF, DOCX, or TXT file into audio you can listen to anywhere — on your commute, while studying, or when your eyes need a rest. No app to install. No account. No uploads to any server. Everything runs entirely in your browser. Your files stay on your device, always.

posts.tagline: Music feedback, community, and discovery for artists.
posts.description: TrackAnalysis is a feedback and growth platform for independent artists. Upload a song to get practical feedback on release readiness and musical balance, then share it for peer feedback, discovery, and support from the community. The goal is to motivate artists to create more music, connect with other musicians, and keep improving over time.

posts.name: Shumway SEO Toolkit
posts.tagline: Private on-page SEO data, exports, tools, and SERP previews
posts.description: Shumway SEO Toolkit is a fast, private, local-first browser extension for folks who need on-page data without juggling multiple extensions and developer tools. Inspect metadata, schema, headings, links, images, HTTP trace, SERP previews, robots.txt, accessibility tree, webmaster shortcuts, and flexible exports in one workspace. It runs from your active tab, with no accounts, tracking, telemetry, or server-side uploads. Built for quick audits and clean exports in multiple different formats.

posts.name: SevHunt
posts.tagline: Reward your employees for reporting security bugs
posts.description: With SevHunt's Internal Bug Bounty platform your coworkers act as security researchers, reporting security issues for points that can be exchanged for exclusive rewards. posts.name: Heku
posts.tagline: Convert any API to MCP locally, Make agents grow their tools
posts.description: heku turns MCP servers into a config file. No more custom auth, transport, and tool boilerplate for every API you plug into an agent. Point it at an HTTP API, a database, gRPC, or another MCP server. A tiny manifest exposes config dicovery tools first, so the LLM lazily discovers tools only when needed. Context stays lean, credentials stay isolated, tools hot-reload mid-session. Apache 2.0. The boilerplate harness I kept rewriting by hand.

posts.name: ZipSnapper
posts.tagline: Fast, private image converter — nothing leaves your device
posts.description: ZipSnapper is a free image converter that runs entirely in your browser. Convert PNG, JPG, and WebP in any direction, no upload, no signup, no file limits. Your images never leave your device, so it's instant and completely private. Batch convert whole folders at once.

posts.name: SkillBridge Global
posts.tagline: Know exactly which skills are costing you job with live data
posts.description: SkillBridge Global analyzes your resume against 2,300+ live job postings and tells you exactly which skills are costing you opportunities with a gap score, certification ROI rankings, and weekly job alerts. Available in 8 languages, built for job seekers in Africa, LATAM, SE Asia, Europe, and beyond.

posts.name: VantagePoint
posts.tagline: AI operating intelligence for executive teams
posts.description: VantagePoint gives executive teams an AI operating layer for work spread across inboxes, spreadsheets, vendor threads, finance files, and board packs. It surfaces interventions, vendor risk, spend under review, decision status, and source confidence in one executive brief. The demo uses fictional data and shows a private-preview workflow for moving from scattered updates to evidence-backed action.

posts.name: Zimmer AI
posts.tagline: Run Open Source AI Locally
posts.description: Zimmer is the ultimate local AI workspace for macOS. Run open source models, orchestrate multi-agent workflows, with zero technical setup.

posts.name: RepostGrid
posts.tagline: Free online image splitter for social tiles.
posts.description: Free online image splitter for TikTok repost banners, Instagram grids, carousels, and social tiles. Upload, crop, preview, and download in order.

posts.name: f0rmless
posts.tagline: The slipgate to live competitive gaming.
posts.description: Live esports schedule for CS2, Valorant, League, Dota 2, Rocket League and more — every pro match, when it starts in your timezone, and where to watch.

posts.name: MatrixNet
posts.tagline: Little Snitch meets Wireshark — passive & open source
posts.description: A passive macOS network monitor that unites two tools in one native app: per-app monitoring (which app connects where) + packet-level dissection (what's actually on the wire), with a correlation layer tying every captured packet back to its process. 100% passive — no NetworkExtension, no proxy, no HTTPS interception — so it runs alongside any VPN, proxy or filter without conflict. JA4 fingerprints, IPv4/IPv6 GeoIP map, threat flagging, and a desktop widget. Open source, Apache-2.0.

posts.name: Never Miss Meetings
posts.tagline: Never miss another meeting with Google Calendar alarms
posts.description: Never Miss Meetings is an Android app that syncs with Google Calendar so you can create dedicated alarms for the meetings that matter. Choose when they ring, how long they ring, and how loud they ring—all in just a few taps. Google Calendar gives you notifications. Never Miss Meetings gives you alarms.

posts.name: Cadence by Martechzy
posts.tagline: Score your Klaviyo flows. Find the missed revenue
posts.description: Connect your Klaviyo account and get an instant health score for every active flow. Cadence identifies which flows are underperforming, which ones are missing entirely, and exactly where revenue is slipping through the cracks. The same analysis a lifecycle marketing consultant would take weeks to deliver. Cadence runs continuously, with no agency required

posts.name: Advocad App
posts.tagline: ai powered devrel metrics measurement
posts.description: Advocad is the system of record for developer advocates and content creators. Paste a link to any talk, video, post or podcast — it crawls the real platform metrics (views, likes, comments, plays) and rolls everything into one reach dashboard you can actually show your boss. Dated snapshots build a growth curve per activity, offline talks can be logged by hand, and AI suggests tags to keep your library organised. Stop guessing your impact — prove it with real numbers.

posts.name: ServiceInvoice
posts.tagline: Professional invoices for service businesses
posts.description: Invoicing built for handymen, electricians, plumbers, and solo trades. Log customers, track work, and turn finished jobs into professional PDF invoices in seconds. Add your own logo, rates, and payment details. Free plan included, no credit card needed. Pro removes limits and branding for $9/month. Built by a solo developer who wanted invoicing to take less time than the job itself.

posts.name: Emra.app
posts.tagline: Create your own app ecosystem by chatting with AI
posts.description: Build apps, tools, games, and personal software with a free Emra account. No code needed. Start with customizable app templates, and simple tools.

posts.name: BudgetBug
posts.tagline: Everything Mint was — and more. Privacy-first.
posts.description: BudgetBug is everything Mint was and more — budgets, bills, real-time spending, net worth, forecasts, investments, and secure Plaid bank sync. Privacy-first: no ads, no tracking, no data selling. Free to start; Standard ($40/yr) and Premium ($80/yr) — all under the $95–$109/yr competitors. Meet Bugsy, your AI money companion (Premium, 30-day free trial). iOS, Android & web.

posts.name: Rank Pilot
posts.tagline: Highlight SEO issues directly on webpages
posts.description: Rank Pilot is a visual SEO Chrome extension that helps marketers, agencies, and business owners find on-page SEO issues faster. Instead of only showing a report, it highlights problems directly on the live webpage, including H1 headings, missing image alt text, broken images, and potential broken links. It also checks metadata, canonicals, robots, Open Graph, and gives AI-powered SEO suggestions.

posts.name: LicenseTrack
posts.tagline: Automated licensing for indie composers
posts.description: LicenseTrack monitors platforms 24/7, detects when your Creative Commons music is used commercially, and handles licensing resolution automatically. No label needed. Built for indie composers who deserve the same protection as major artists.

posts.name: Image Pipeline
posts.tagline: Batch image processing in browser. No signup.
posts.description: Image Pipeline is a privacy-first, browser-based batch image processor. Build visual workflows with a node-based editor — resize, crop, compress, convert, watermark, denoise, rename. Process hundreds of images in one click. 🔒 100% Private — everything runs client-side. ⚡ No Signup. 💰 Pay Once, Use Forever — Free for basic use. Pro $10. Lifetime $30. 🌍 EN + RU.

posts.name: APEX
posts.tagline: Know what the pros know
posts.description: APEX is an AI-powered business health scanner that gives anyone the same financial analysis a professional analyst would spend hours producing — in 30 seconds. Type any company name or stock ticker and get a full health report: APEX score, key financial metrics, red flags, and an AI verdict on what it all means. No spreadsheets, no jargon, no Bloomberg terminal required. Built by a 16-year-old indie developer.

posts.name: Chilly's Ice: Slide Puzzle
posts.tagline: Frozen logic mazes
posts.description: Chilly's Ice looks calm until your first slide. One swipe sends Chilly gliding across the frozen board, and there is no stopping until the ice, rocks, and walls decide otherwise. That simple rule turns every level into a crisp little logic maze: read the board, plan your stops, and reach the goal with the fewest moves you can.

posts.name: Langula
posts.tagline: Learn 23 languages free in your browser — no signup, no app
posts.description: Langula is a free language-learning web app that runs entirely in your browser. Pick from 23 languages, work through structured A1–B2 courses with flashcards, and practice speaking with built-in pronunciation feedback — your audio never leaves your device. No account, no subscription, nothing to install. The interface itself comes in 23 languages, including dedicated courses like German for hospitality workers.

posts.name: Langulife
posts.tagline: Unscripted language practice.
posts.description: Langulife is the premier social language practice app for A2-C1 learners. Bridge the gap to real-world fluency through interactive conversation prompts and community engagement.

posts.name: ControllerKeys
posts.tagline: Turn your game controller into a Mac productivity device
posts.description: Transform your Xbox, PS5 DualSense, PS4 DualShock 4, Steam Controller, Nintendo Joy-Con, Apple TV Siri Remote, 8BitDo Zero 2 & Micro, or 300+ third-party controllers into a powerful macOS productivity tool. JavaScript scripting engine, gyroscope aiming, swipe typing, GTA-style command wheel, macros, webhooks, app-specific profiles, Mac-to-Mac controller handoff, and on-screen keyboard. Perfect for vibe coding with Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot. Source available, signed & notarized by Apple.

posts.name: KalaConnect
posts.tagline: AI marketplace empowering artisans to sell globally
posts.description: KalaConnect helps artisans grow their business using AI. Create product descriptions, generate marketing content, translate listings into multiple languages, and reach buyers worldwide through one simple marketplace.

posts.name: Reclips
posts.tagline: Paste your clipboard history right at your cursor
posts.description: Reclips is a caret-anchored clipboard manager for macOS. Hit a hotkey and a little bubble pops up right where your cursor is — pick a clip with ↑/↓ and paste in place. No more jumping to a corner window. It lives in your menu bar and remembers text, links, images, colors, and files.

posts.description: Build apps, tools, games, and personal software with a free Emra account. No code needed. Start with customizable app templates, and simple tools.

posts.tagline: Private AI roleplay that runs fully on your iPhone
posts.description: Chat and roleplay with a cast of 32 hand-crafted AI characters — running entirely on your iPhone. No accounts, on-device, works offline. Your conversations never leave your phone.

posts.name: GetTimezone
posts.tagline: Schedule meetings across timezones with easy.
posts.description: Get Timezone - A beautiful multi-timezone scheduling tool to coordinate meetings across time zones, schedule meetings across timezones without the math.

posts.description: Invoicing built for handymen, electricians, plumbers, and solo trades. Log customers, track work, and turn finished jobs into professional PDF invoices in seconds. Add your own logo, rates, and payment details. Free plan included, no credit card needed. Pro removes limits and branding for $9/month. Built by a solo developer who wanted invoicing to take less time than the job itself.

posts.name: Bondlyfe
posts.tagline: Ask them out with a NO button that runs away
posts.description: Bondlyfe turns "will you be mine?" into a moment. Build a proposal, valentine, or promposal page where the NO button dodges the cursor so the only answer is yes. Plus 100+ free love tools: love calculator, zodiac compatibility, rizz lines & more. No sign-up.

posts.name: Donely - Agent Hackers
posts.tagline: AI assisted Red-Teaming. Self evolving security harness
posts.description: Donely Security is an agentic red team platform that tests your website, apps, APIs, and internet-facing infrastructure. For our PH launch, selected companies can apply for a free pentest. Submit your scope, sign safe harbor, and book a call 3 days later. We’ll show verified findings with proof, impact, and reproduction steps.

posts.name: Serendip Moments
posts.tagline: Reconnect with strangers who shared your moment
posts.description: A global map for reconnecting with strangers you shared a moment with — a lost pet, a thank-you never said, a reunion, a future trip. Pin the place and time, and if someone else does too, you get matched. Built solo. Beta — feedback welcome.

posts.name: Lightreach (Free Outreach Emails)
posts.tagline: Instantly alternative — self-hosted cold email, free
posts.description: Lightreach: free, self-hosted Instantly alternative for cold email outreach. No monthly fees, no vendor lock-in — runs on your own SMTP mailboxes via SQLite. Multi-step sequences w/ spintax + variable fallbacks, mailbox rotation, IMAP reply/warmup detection, CSV lead import, send-window scheduling w/ daily caps + jitter. Built-in MCP server — control campaigns, sequences, leads, inbox straight from Claude or any MCP client. One `pnpm dev` and you're sending.

posts.name: TikTok Hook Generator
posts.tagline: https://tiktok-hook-generator-amber.vercel.app
posts.description: TikTok Hook Generator uses Claude AI to write 10 hook options from your niche, topic, and audience — in English, Taglish, or pure Tagalog. Built by a Filipino creator who was tired of staring at a blank screen. Free to try, no signup required.

posts.name: Aethel Workout
posts.tagline: Track gym workouts and calisthenics in a single app.
posts.description: Most fitness apps force a choice between weightlifting and bodyweight training. If your routine mixes both, you usually end up tracking progress across multiple apps or messy text files. Aethel bridges that gap. Built specifically for anyone combining traditional gym sessions with calisthenics, it lets you log weighted sets, bodyweight reps, and skills inside a clean, streamlined iOS interface.

posts.name: Ping.it
posts.tagline: Create pings to remind you of tasks
posts.description: Ping.it helps you track recurring tasks by recording when you last did them. Tap to ping, organize tasks into lists, see your last activity and get gentle hints when it’s time again. From plants and home chores to things like backing up your NAS, it keeps track so you don’t have to. Create up to three pings for free, with seamless sync across iPhone and Apple Watch.

Built specifically for anyone combining traditional gym sessions with calisthenics, it lets you log weighted sets, bodyweight reps, and skills inside a clean, streamlined iOS interface.

makers.name: GianMattia Torrente
makers.headline: Explore my journey, projects, and tech

posts.name: Recall Reads
posts.tagline: Turn wisdom and ideas from your book into lasting insights
posts.description: Recall Reads helps you stay connected to the ideas from books that changed you. Instead of letting great insights fade after you finish reading, it generates personalized wisdom from any book and brings it back through daily reminders, widgets, Apple Watch, and lock screen experiences. It’s not a reading tracker or a quote app. It’s a new way to make the wisdom from your books part of everyday life.

posts.name: Slyde HQ
posts.tagline: Make slides. without making slides.
posts.description: Slyde turns a single prompt into a beautiful, ready-to-present deck — pitches, proposals and more.

posts.name: Aviation Gazetteer
posts.tagline: a comprehensive account of all the air museums in the UK
posts.description: The UK has a rich history of aviation and over a hundred brilliant military aircraft museums mostly run by volunteers. I thought they could do with a nice website to catalog them all

posts.name: ShipFit
posts.tagline: Kill bad ideas fast. Make good ideas win. Validate for free!
posts.description: Kill bad ideas fast. Make good ideas win. ShipFit is the pre-code decision engine that turns a vague idea into a product worth building. One sentence in, a ship-ready playbook out: 9 sequential decisions guided by 55 proven frameworks and real data, not AI slop. 24% get a kill verdict. Leave with your buyer, price, scope, launch plan, and build-ready configs for Cursor, Claude Code and more. From $5, no card to start.

posts.name: Spectral Field
posts.tagline: Turn any track into a one-of-a-kind artwork, drawn live.
posts.description: Most music visualisers just react to volume in real time — nothing to keep once the song ends. Spectral Field is different: it analyses the whole track's audio to generate one fixed, deterministic artwork — same track, same piece, every time. It runs entirely in your browser (audio never uploaded), and any piece exports as a high-res print or a pen-plotter-ready SVG. Built as a personal project by a musician who wanted his own tracks to have a visual identity — no existing tool did quite this.

posts.name: ck.gg
posts.tagline: Lease a name that reads like a one-word .gg domain
posts.description: ha.ck.gg reads hack.gg. sta.ck.gg reads stack.gg. The one-word originals trade for five to six figures — if they're for sale at all. ck.gg turns one domain into every *ck word in English: hack, stack, track, click, deck, kick, block and 70+ more. Each word is leased exactly once, comes with full NS delegation (your DNS zone, your TLS, your email), goes live within 24 hours, and starts at €190/year. Four names are already in use by live products.

posts.name: Look it up - Reference Cards
posts.tagline: Know it. Find it. Own it.
posts.description: Stop digging through notes and old screenshots. Look it up puts your info in smart reference cards. It's in a note somewhere. In a photo nobody labeled. In a chat message you sent yourself eighteen months ago. In a screenshot of a tire pressure sticker - on a phone you no longer own. Look it up is where your information actually lives. Not shoved into a generic note. Not buried in a folder nobody opens. Structured into smart reference cards with exactly the fields that belong.

posts.name: FreeConcreteCalc
posts.tagline: Calculate Concrete for Any Project — Bags, Yards & Cost
posts.description: Free concrete calculator for slabs, footings, post holes, walls, columns & stairs. Calculate cubic yards, 60lb & 80lb bag counts, and project cost — works like Quikrete and Sakrete calculators but with more features.

makers.name: Deepanshu Pathania
makers.headline: Building free web tools, no signup

posts.name: GetTimezone
posts.tagline: Schedule meetings across timezones with easy.
posts.description: Get Timezone - A beautiful multi-timezone scheduling tool to coordinate meetings across time zones, schedule meetings across timezones without the math.

posts.tagline: Track unpaid and partial job payments
posts.description: WhoPaid is a simple iOS job payment tracker for freelancers, contractors, home-service workers, and small teams. Add each job, mark it paid, unpaid, or partially paid, track remaining balances, and set follow-up reminders without setting up full accounting software.

posts.name: NoQuit
posts.tagline: Never lose work to Cmd+Q on Mac
posts.description: NoQuit is a tiny macOS app that protects you from accidental Cmd+Q quits. makers.headline: 100 cold calls a day. Building ZipLead.

posts.name: InTruth
posts.tagline: Real-time fact-checking of political speech and debates
posts.description: Traditional, manual fact-checkers publish docs days after the debate ends. InTruth works as soon as a sentence leaves a politician's mouth. Install on Chrome, open any debate or political interview on YouTube, and verdicts start appearing in seconds, from TRUE, FALSE, MISLEADING, to SUBSTANTIALLY TRUE. Grounded in live web sources accessible to the user, with speaker attribution. No API key or setup, just install and watch! Built as a part of a research project @ USC. Beta open now!

makers.name: Risha Panigrahi
makers.headline: Builder of InTruth, CS + CompLing @ USC

posts.name: Yorsuite
posts.tagline: Stop chasing clients. AI handles your client work.

Yorsuite actually does the work: → Chases late invoices in your voice — no more awkward "just checking in" emails. → Briefs you daily on what's slipping and which clients are about to go quiet. → Catches scope creep and drafts the change order before you eat the cost. → Proposals, contracts, projects, invoicing and a client portal

posts.name: PurseLink
posts.tagline: Virtual money, lovingly delivered
posts.description: PurseLink turns a money gift into something you can hand someone. Fund it, and it arrives as a secure link — by email, text, or printed for any greeting card. The recipient claims it and picks how to get paid: Venmo, PayPal, Cash App, Apple Pay, or Google Pay — no app, no account, no sign-up. You send the money from your own payment app.

posts.name: TikTok Viral Score - Retention Analyzer
posts.tagline: See exactly why your TikTok is working (or isn't)
posts.description: Paste a public TikTok link and get an instant, deterministic breakdown of your hook, hashtags, timing, and real reach — no AI model needed for the free score. Add your own API key (Claude/OpenAI/Gemini/Groq/Ollama) for tailored written feedback on that exact video: what's working, what to fix, and an alternate caption to test. Also includes a Spotify-Wrapped-style recap of your own posting habits.

makers.name: Naia Lorente Martínez
makers.headline: Data Science & AI, Responsible ML, MLOps

Free Action, or a hosted App with no key and no CI config.

makers.headline: 100 cold calls a day. Building ZipLead.

posts.name: Grablo Vision
posts.tagline: No-code AI automation for the cameras you already own
posts.description: Grablo Vision turns cameras you already own into no-code AI automations. Add person, face, license-plate, or fire detection, then build rules: when something is detected, run actions in sequence like alerts, text-to-speech, logging with snapshots, or Zigbee/relay control. Works with RTSP, ONVIF, and USB cameras. It all runs locally on your own hardware (Raspberry Pi, PC, Docker, or a Home Assistant add-on) and keeps working even if your internet drops. Free for personal, non-commercial use.

posts.name: Riplox
posts.tagline: The all-in-one video downloader for Android
posts.description: Riplox is a free, ad-free Android app that downloads video and audio from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, Facebook and more. Pick any quality up to 4K or rip MP3 audio, grab whole playlists, embed subtitles, and keep private downloads in a PIN-locked vault. Open-source, no sign-up.

makers.name: Muhammad Nazim
makers.headline: Family of free games and tools.

posts.name: InTruth
posts.tagline: Real-time fact-checking of political speech and debates
posts.description: Traditional, manual fact-checkers publish docs days after the debate ends. InTruth works as soon as a sentence leaves a politician's mouth. Install on Chrome, open any debate or political interview on YouTube, and verdicts start appearing in seconds, from TRUE, FALSE, MISLEADING, to SUBSTANTIALLY TRUE. Grounded in live web sources accessible to the user, with speaker attribution. No API key or setup, just install and watch! Built as a part of a research project @ USC. Beta open now!

makers.name: Risha Panigrahi
makers.headline: Builder of InTruth, CS + CompLing @ USC

posts.name: Blyft
posts.tagline: AI Vibe Coding to build, brand & launch startups
posts.description: Blyft is an AI Vibe Coding platform that helps founders, creators and businesses go from idea to launch in minutes. Instead of only generating an app, Blyft also creates all the branding and launch assets you need, including a landing page, logo, promo video and marketing content, all from a single prompt. No more switching between multiple tools—build, brand and launch your startup in one place.

posts.name: Vesper
posts.tagline: The one-tap drink tracker for people who still drink
posts.description: A drink tracker for people who still like a drink and just want to keep an eye on it. Set a limit for the night, tap once for each round on your iPhone or Apple Watch, then note how you feel the next morning. After a few weeks, your real patterns start to show.

posts.name: FAYD
posts.tagline: Send and receive money without internet Connection
posts.description: Imagine your digital wallet worked exactly like physical cash. Fast. Private. And 100% offline. Introducing FAYD—the world’s first local-first, offline-to-offline payment app. Whether you’re in a crowded festival, stuck in a concrete basement, or flying over the Atlantic, FAYD lets you send and receive money with absolutely zero internet, zero cell signal, and zero waiting. Just type the amount, show your code, scan, and go. Your money shouldn't depend on your bars. Welcome to the future.

posts.name: Mentalys
posts.tagline: Be present. We'll keep the record.
posts.description: Psychiatrists spend 2-3 hours daily on documentation. Mentalys fixes that. AI SOAP notes in 3 minutes from session recordings. Real-time pharmacogenomic alerts — upload a GeneSight report and instantly see which medications to avoid based on your patient's actual genes. CYP2D6 poor metabolizer on Fluoxetine? Mentalys flags it before you sign. HIPAA compliant, BAA included, full audit log. Solo from $499/month. 7-day free trial.

posts.name: ProtonSearch
posts.tagline: Find everything on your PC. From one shortcut.

Upload your notes and files, and Selrano turns them into flashcards, answers questions grounded in your material, and runs spaced-repetition review, all in one calm, focused place. Free to start.

posts.tagline: A cute pet that makes sure you never miss a reminder.
posts.description: Pet Reminder reimagines reminders on macOS with a cute desktop pet that appears when it's time to act. Instead of relying only on notifications that are easy to dismiss, it combines a friendly desktop companion with smart scheduling, native macOS notifications, snooze, and advance reminders. It's lightweight, distraction-free, and designed to help you remember everyday tasks, meetings, habits, medication, and more.

posts.name: PurseLink
posts.tagline: Virtual money, lovingly delivered
posts.description: PurseLink turns a money gift into something you can hand someone. Fund it, and it arrives as a secure link — by email, text, or printed for any greeting card. The recipient claims it and picks how to get paid: Venmo, PayPal, Cash App, Apple Pay, or Google Pay — no app, no account, no sign-up. You send the money from your own payment app.

posts.name: NomadTaxCalc

Built for digital nomads who hop borders, it covers 178 countries, resolves 1,300+ tax treaties automatically, and handles FEIE, fiscal limbo, self-employment contributions, and compliance checklists all in one free calculator. No account needed. No BS. Just your income, your countries, and a clear answer.

Supports GitHub.com, GitLab.com & GitLab Self Hosted from day 1.

The scratch docker image is <4.5 MB (compressed), the alpine one is <8.5 MB (compressed), and it uses <10 MB of RAM under regular use. Most URL shorteners are either bloated with unnecessary features, or are a pain to set up. Even fewer are written with simplicity and lightness in mind. So, I decided to fix that.

posts.description: Prompetitor is a prompt competition built on real artwork. You study a piece of art, write a natural-language prompt, and an AI image model tries to recreate it. Your score reflects how closely the result matches the original — plus a small bonus for speed.

posts.name: Suggest Me Something
posts.tagline: what to watch, read, or hear, based on your mood
posts.description: Streaming apps and "best of" lists don't know your mood tonight — they just show you what's popular. Suggest Me Something works differently: answer a few quick questions about how you're feeling and how much time you have, and get a shortlist of real movies, series, anime, books, or songs that actually match — pulled from trusted catalogs like TMDB, OMDb, and Jikan, not a fixed list. No account needed. Your quiz answers live in the page URL, so nothing is tracked or stored

makers.name: harshit chawla
makers.headline: Non-tech guy, trying to build something

posts.name: MTimer - Meditate & Measure the results
posts.tagline: Clean, unguided meditation timer for all who sit regularly.
posts.description: MTimer is a simple, private meditation timer built for regular practitioners. No guided voices, social features, or distractions. just your practice, a timer, and a bell. Set custom sessions, use interval bells and ambient sounds, track your progress, and explore how your body settles with optional on-device Calm Score using wearable data. Fully offline, ad-free, and designed to keep your meditation data private.

posts.name: VeloApply
posts.tagline: AI-powered job application tool — tailors your resume and CL
posts.description: VeloApply is an AI job application tool built by an 8-year HR and recruitment veteran. Upload your CV once, and the AI tailors a unique resume and cover letter for every job you apply to. A Chrome extension auto-fills application forms on Workday, Greenhouse, LinkedIn, Indeed, and 1,000+ career sites — including EEO questions, custom dropdowns, and work authorization fields. You review and approve every application before submission. Free tier includes 5 applications with no credit card.

posts.name: Socialmait
posts.tagline: Your brand's social marketing team.
posts.description: Socialmait is your step-by-step marketing team. It builds a custom marketing playbook for your business, writes a full month of platform-native posts and ads, and coaches you through every step. No agency, no marketing background, no big budget needed. Works for shop owners, freelancers, startups, local businesses and consultants. Free to start, no credit card.

makers.name: Muhammad Salman
makers.headline: Building my ideas diary using AI.

posts.name: ShapeSync – AI Health Coach
posts.tagline: Your Apple Watch is wrong about your calories. We fix that.
posts.description: ShapeSync reads your Apple Health data from whatever apps you already use — Yazio, MyFitnessPal, Apple Watch, Wahoo — and turns it into a dashboard that explains what's happening with your weight. Two things nobody else seems to do: real plateau detection with trend smoothing + goal-date projection, and a personal Apple Watch calorie-burn calibration that corrects for the Watch's known inaccuracy using your real weight data. 100% private: everything stays on your iPhone, no account, no cloud.

posts.name: Let's get you that job - with intention!
posts.tagline: Stop applying. Start getting hired.
posts.description: Most job seekers apply to everything and hear back from nothing. This guide breaks that cycle with a 5-step framework used to land real interviews and offers. Inside: clarity exercises, 4 ways to find roles that never hit job boards, a resume tailoring method, cold-pitch templates that got replies, an interview prep framework, and a built-in workbook to track it all. Built from my own year-long job search. 30-page PDF, instant download.

posts.name: FilaRank Pro
posts.tagline: Filament SEO Toolkit
posts.description: FilaRank Pro is a Laravel Filament SEO toolkit package which covers live scoring, readability analysis, SERP preview, head tag rendering, redirect management, site-wide health reports and many more.

posts.name: Veltyr
posts.tagline: AI coach that adapts your plan after every workout
posts.description: Most training apps give you a plan and leave you alone. Veltyr's AI coach adapts your entire training schedule after each session — based on how you actually felt. Built for triathletes, runners, cyclists, trail runners, and Hyrox athletes preparing for a race. Post-session feedback → instant plan adjustment. Strava integration. AI coach chat. Weekly load summary. Free plan available · Standard €15/mo · Premium €25/mo · 14-day free trial

posts.name: NegotiateIt
posts.tagline: Practice your salary, rent, or severance talk against an AI
posts.description: Most people freeze in salary talks and leave thousands on the table. NegotiateIt lets you rehearse: negotiate your offer, raise, or promotion against an AI that pushes back like a real hiring manager, get scored, and learn what works. Free to start, no card.

posts.name: Mnemova
posts.tagline: Study less, remember more — now in beta
posts.description: Mnemova uses SM-2 spaced repetition to schedule your reviews automatically. No gamified noise — just the science of memory, built for uni students. Web is in beta now; mobile is in active development. Join early & help shape it

posts.name: Damaz Design - Nội thất Vinh
posts.tagline: Thiết kế và thi công tronj gói tại Vinh , Nghệ An
posts.description: Damaz Design là đơn vị thiết kế & thi công nội thất trọn gói tại Vinh, Nghệ An. Chúng tôi giải bài toán "nhà đẹp nhưng vượt ngân sách" bằng cách: 1. Xưởng sản xuất trực tiếp tại Nghi Kim, Vinh → Không qua trung gian 2. Báo giá minh bạch từng hạng mục MDF, Acrylic, đá Vicostone 3. 500+ công trình thực tế đã bàn giao: biệt thự, nhà phố, quán cafe Web có đủ: File 3D, mặt bằng CAD, báo giá chi tiết cho KTS & chủ nhà. Website: damazdesign.vn Showroom: 36 Thăng LOng, TP Vinh

posts.name: Crypto Bot Dev Kit
posts.tagline: Crypto trading bots in 10m — minimal TypeScript dev kit
posts.description: Minimal TypeScript toolkit for building Binance trading bots. Includes typed API client, webhook receiver for TradingView signals, EMA + RSI strategies, CLI runner, and backtester. Flat architecture, zero framework overhead, runs locally.

posts.name: Agenario
posts.tagline: Prove your AI-built app is ready to launch.
posts.description: Agenario is the evidence-first launch review platform for AI-built apps. Scan a GitHub repo, ZIP, or live URL for launch blockers across security, access control, payments, compliance, performance, reliability, and UX. Unlike generic AI code review, Agenario links findings to code, impact, confidence, reproduction steps, and runtime proof when available—then helps you fix and rescan before users find the problem.

posts.name: LockLeaf
posts.tagline: Earn screen time by answering quizzes
posts.description: LockLeaf is an iPhone focus app that helps you stop opening distracting apps on autopilot. Instead of forcing you to delete social apps or rely on willpower, LockLeaf adds a quiz gate before scrolling. You can block distracting apps, answer quick quizzes, review flashcards, build streaks, earn XP, and turn screen time into a reward for learning. It is designed to make focus feel playful, intentional, and easier to keep.

posts.tagline: 38 free online tools, no signup, 6 languages
posts.description: Korelyy provides 38 free online tools for PDF, image, text, code, math, color, and network processing. No registration required, no ads, no tracking. Available in 6 languages. 🔧 Tools: PDF (Merge, Split, Compress, Convert, Watermark, Password), Image (Compress, Resize, Convert), Text, Code, Math, Color, Network tools. 🌍 6 languages (EN, ZH, ES, HI, FR, AR) ⚡ Cloudflare CDN 🔒 Privacy-first (client-side processing) 📱 Mobile-friendly Try it: https://korelyy.com

posts.name: Pingline
posts.tagline: The uptime monitor that proves it
posts.description: Pingline checks your site every minute, alerts you within ~2 minutes of real downtime, and gives your users a status page they can trust. Free for 10 monitors.

posts.name: Daggerhearth
posts.tagline: Character sheets for the tabletop game Daggerheart
posts.description: Daggerhearth is the digital character sheet companion app for Daggerheart Built on the official System Reference Document so your rules are always accurate. Equip a weapon or change your armor and your stats recalculate automatically. No math, no mistakes. Full character sheet with automatic stat calculations Easy character creation guide Class-specific tracking. Druids manage Beast Form, Rangers track their companion Rules tooltips throughout so you can learn as you play

posts.name: ذكاء — Zakia
posts.tagline: Free AI writing tools in Arabic & English — no signup needed
posts.description: Zakia is a free AI-powered platform with 7 professional tools: 📄 ATS Resume Builder ✉️ Professional Email Writer 📱 Instagram Caption Generator 💬 Smart WhatsApp Replies 📝 Text Summariser 💡 Creative Idea Generator 🪪 Passport Photo Editor ✅ 100% free · No account required · Works in Arabic & English Built for the 400M+ Arabic-speaking internet users who lack quality AI tools in their language.

posts.name: Mulch Calculator Online
posts.tagline: Free Landscaping Calculators — Mulch, Soil, Compost & More
posts.description: A free, instant calculator for landscaping and garden projects. Enter your area and depth to calculate exactly how much mulch, topsoil, compost, or gravel you need — no signup, no hassle. Unlike generic calculators, it also gives cost estimates and covers multiple materials (mulch, topsoil, compost, rubber mulch, gravel, manure) in one place, with more calculators being added regularly.

posts.name: myRosetta
posts.tagline: Anonymous letters. True connection.
posts.description: myRosetta is social media redesigned for reflection, not performance. How well do your closest friends really know you? Despite being so connected in this digital age, do they know what you wanted to be as a child? Or about the teacher/mentor who shaped who you are? myRosetta lets you invite your closest friends into a private circle. Each week you all receive a thoughtful question, answer anonymously, and then read each other’s sealed letters. A kind of honesty that deepens friendships.

makers.name: Ryan Fredericks
makers.headline: Building a suite of ethical social media

posts.name: MyHermes Host
posts.tagline: 24/7 running Hermes agent connected to all your apps
posts.description: Run a 24/7 private Hermes agent with web chat, Telegram, WhatsApp, app integrations, Kanban tasks, cron jobs, memory, and your own model key.

posts.name: SellMate AI
posts.tagline: Your reselling OS inside Telegram
posts.description: SellMate AI is a Telegram-based assistant for resellers selling across Amazon, Shopify, eBay, and Etsy. It helps you manage products, track listings, and streamline operations directly in Telegram without switching between multiple dashboards and tools. Built for modern ecommerce operators who want everything in one place.

posts.name: ATLAS
posts.tagline: AI that guesses any street view location in 3 seconds
posts.description: ATLAS looks at a street view image and predicts where in the world it is: country right about 81% of the time, measured in real games. Built as a Windows desktop app for GeoGuessr players who want an AI teammate, coach, or bot.

makers.name: Sven
makers.headline: Solo builder of ATLAS, AI for GeoGuessr

posts.name: CastMyMood
posts.tagline: Your AI Mood Companion
posts.description: Type how you feel — 'I'm exhausted but it's not about sleep.' 'Missing my mom.' 'My kids are driving me crazy lol.' 'My heart is all over the place.' CastMyMood gets it every time. No dropdowns. No mood scales. Just type and get a mood-matched mantra, playlist, meal suggestion, and meeting opener instantly. Plus Stay With Me — an AI companion that already knows what you typed. 300+ moods. Zero toxic positivity.

makers.name: Tamika Forrester
makers.headline: No code, all vision | Coming soon 💜

posts.name: Vaultly
posts.tagline: Keep and remember
posts.description: Vaultly is an AI-powered knowledge workspace that helps you capture, organize, and retrieve everything that matters in one secure place. Save notes, documents, links, and ideas effortlessly, then use intelligent AI search to find, summarize, and interact with your content in seconds. Whether you're a student, professional, creator, or founder, Vaultly keeps your information organized, accessible, and ready whenever you need it, boosting productivity every day.

posts.name: TaoLens
posts.tagline: Bittensor Intelligence Analytics Terminal
posts.description: TaoLens is a real-time intelligence terminal for the Bittensor ecosystem. It pulls together live data across all 129 subnets, Web Intel, KOL social signals, dTAO price tracking, validator stats, and AI analysis into one clean interface. Most Bittensor users juggle 4 or 5 tools just to get a full picture. TaoLens replaces all of them. Built by a solo developer who got tired of tab switching while trying to make sense of the network.

posts.name: DataVertex
posts.tagline: The all-in-one candidate sourcing API for recruiting product
posts.description: DataVertex helps recruiting software products build sourcing, search, matching, and enrichment features with a single API. Our Candidate API enables access to 800M+ global candidate profiles, semantic search, verified personal emails and mobile phones with a built-in waterfall, and AI-ready candidate matching, without the need to integrate multiple data sources. It helps product teams ship more recruiting features faster with less engineering effort.

posts.name: AntiRecsys
posts.tagline: Block your all social media distraction with this app.
posts.description: Break free from algorithmic feeds. AntiRecsys helps you browse social media intentionally by focusing on topics YOU choose.

posts.name: Mailtwig
posts.tagline: AI-Powered Gmail Export, Parsing & Mail Merge
posts.description: Tired of manually copying data from emails? MailTwig brings AI-powered automation straight into Gmail. ✅ Export Gmail Data – Instantly export To, From, CC, BCC, Subject, Labels, Attachments & Dates to Excel or CSV. ✅ AI Data Extraction – Automatically pull emails, phone numbers, company names, invoices & tracking numbers from conversations. ✅ Personalized Mail Merge – Send tailored campaigns with custom fields, templates, scheduling & tracking—all from one dashboard. Try MailTwig today!

posts.name: ProTileCalc
posts.tagline: The professional tile calculator that shows its work.
posts.description: Most tile calculators are black boxes built by template generators. ProTileCalc is a suite of free, transparent estimating tools built for contractors and serious renovators. It calculates tile waste (straight vs herringbone), grout by weight, and thinset by trowel notch. Every calculation is based on industry-standard TCNA methods and explicitly shows the governing formula so you can verify the math.

posts.name: Aura — Soundscapes for Deep Flow
posts.tagline: City soundscapes that react to your weather
posts.description: Minimal ambient sound app. Open, press play, done. City mode: 9 scenes with cities and weather. Raining in Tokyo? It rains in the soundscape. Clear in Paris? It stays clear. Nature mode: 18 cards to blend your own mix. Ocean + campfire + temple bells? Your call. Hidden sounds unlock as you listen. Set a timer if you need. No internet needed — sounds live on your device. No accounts. No ads. No tracking. Built by one person. Free. If it brings calm, your support keeps it growing.

posts.name: Pulse
posts.tagline: Self-hosted real-time collaboration for any website
posts.description: Most collaboration SDKs are hosted SaaS: your users' comments live on someone else's servers. Pulse is self-hosted: one tag adds comments pinned to pixels, live cursors, presence, reactions, and voice/video notes to any website, backed by your own Postgres. The hard part is pins that don't drift: Pulse anchors each one to three DOM landmarks with barycentric coordinates and degrades through four fallback tiers, so pins survive reflows and redesigns. Multi-tenant, themeable, REST API.

posts.name: ReelsMotor
posts.tagline: Turn listing photos into scroll-stopping Reels in 2 min
posts.description: ReelsMotor turns car and property listing photos into ready-to-post vertical videos — Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts — complete with AI voiceover, licensed music and your own branding. No editing, no videographer. Upload 3–10 photos, get a video in about 2 minutes. Built for independent car dealers, estate agents and online sellers who don't have time to edit video for every listing. First video is free to try.

posts.name: Picsorta
posts.tagline: Sort your photos into folders at the speed of thought
posts.description: Picsorta is a free, browser-based tool for sorting and culling large photo sets. Map your arrow keys to four destination folders and file each image with one keypress. Zoom, pan, undo with Ctrl+Z, and move originals losslessly. It runs entirely in your browser — no uploads, no cloud, no account. Your images never leave your device. Perfect for photographers culling a shoot, or anyone taming a messy downloads folder. Works in Chrome, Edge, Brave and Opera.

posts.name: Athena
posts.tagline: The context engine between your code, teams, and AI.
posts.description: Athena sits between your code, your team, and any AI agent. It holds shared knowledge of every repo, decision, and convention, grounds the AI, gates every change by your team, and meters every dollar of AI spend by feature, team, and project. Your coding agents plug straight in - and get all of it.

posts.tagline: The context engine between your code, teams, and AI.

posts.tagline: Password-protect and disguise files on any device
posts.description: Cyphro helps you protect sensitive files directly on your device. Secure files with a password, disguise them as other file types, and keep full control of your data without uploads, accounts, or cloud storage. Everything runs locally in your browser, making file protection accessible from virtually any device.

posts.name: ForgeCat
posts.tagline: Package, share, and install AI Agents across platforms.
posts.description: ForgeCat makes agent profiles, skills, rules, and MCP configs installable across tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. Instead of rebuilding the same setup for every agent platform, creators can package once and users can search, inspect, and install with one command. npm install -g forgecat

posts.name: BookFoundry
posts.tagline: Turn your idea or content into a publish-ready book with AI.
posts.description: BookFoundry is an AI book-creation platform that takes you from a single idea or raw content to a finished, publish-ready book. It writes full-length manuscripts with real chapter-to-chapter continuity, designs your cover, validates Amazon KDP categories, and exports clean EPUB, PDF, and DOCX files. It supports fiction, non-fiction, memoir, children's books, and screenplays across 18 languages, with a built-in AI detector, humanizer, book formatter, and translation. Start free.

posts.name: Schedulify
posts.tagline: Schedule product, discount, and theme changes.
posts.description: vent Scheduler lets you plan store changes ahead of time so they happen automatically. Instead of staying up late to launch a sale, set the date and time, and the app handles it. Create a plan, add actions like changing prices, enabling discounts, updating inventory, or toggling theme sections, then schedule it. Every action runs at once when the time comes. Every action saves a snapshot of the original state. If something goes wrong, restore it with one click.

posts.name: Nexora
posts.tagline: Turn your daily habits into a cozy RPG garden game.
posts.description: Nexora is a free habit tracker built to beat checklist burnout. Instead of boring checkboxes, completing your routines drops mystery seeds to plant on a 3x3 dashboard grid. Watch your garden grow and keep your little mascot happy based on your consistency streaks!

posts.name: Agent Pantheon
posts.tagline: 5,700+ AI agents, find the best!
posts.description: Agent Pantheon is a directory of 5,700+ AI agents and tools, ranked by real user reviews — not marketing hype. We built it inside WNC to track the fast-moving AI-agent space for ourselves, then opened it to everyone. • 5,700+ tools across 180+ categories • Ranked by real user reviews • Head-to-head "battles" — the community votes • A world map of where teams are based • Free to browse, no login wall If you build, buy, or just try to keep up with AI agents — start here.

posts.description: Native Swift macOS folder organizer with notch drop hub, automatic rules, previews, undo, and bilingual UI. - cellmigrate/NotchFolderTidyNotch Folder Tidy is a native macOS app that monitors folders and automatically organizes files by editable rules. It includes preview-before-moving, undo, a notch-area drop hub, custom shortcuts, bilingual UI, and a clean Apple-style interface.

posts.name: YourBodyCalc

posts.name: Alpa
posts.tagline: The financial operating layer for hospitality
posts.description: Alpa gives every restaurant a score: one number out of 100, built on five pillars from your POS, bank and delivery data, that tells you how you're performing and what to improve. Underneath, the platform automates your weekly P&L, cash flow and supplier spend, ingests delivery statements so you see exactly what commission each platform takes, and tracks profitability and margin per location across multi-site groups and franchises. The score is the readout. The platform is the engine.

posts.name: CV Builder online
posts.tagline: Actually free resume builder — no paywall at download
posts.description: Most "free" resume builders hide a paywall behind the download button. CV Builder online doesn't. Build your resume through a guided quiz instead of a blank page, pick an ATS-friendly template, run it through the built-in ATS checker, add a matching cover letter, and export to PDF — all in one place. AI helps with summaries and bullet points when you're stuck. Available in 5 languages. Made by a solo maker to help people land jobs, not subscriptions.

posts.name: LumenChat
posts.tagline: AI chatbot trained on your docs, escalates when stuck
posts.description: Lumen Chat turns your docs, PDFs, and URLs into an AI chatbot that actually knows your product. Upload your knowledge base, embed the widget on your site, and let it answer customer questions instantly; with sources, not hallucinations. When it can't help, it escalates to your team in real time. Built for teams who want support automation without losing the human touch. Multi-tenant, API keys, analytics dashboard included.

posts.name: Locahl
posts.tagline: The hosts file manager that skips terminal
posts.description: Ditch the terminal. Manage hosts, flush DNS, and switch dev environments in one click — €4.99 one-time, 4.9★ rated, Windows/macOS/Linux.

posts.tagline: From HTML template to website launch, 90% faster&cheaper
posts.description: SiteKrs is a foolproof website builder for non-technical people. Pick a template or import your own static HTML, then edit text, images, links, and SEO settings visually with no login required. Export clean, portable code for $29 per template, or publish in one click to GitHub Pages with automated Cloudflare DNS and HTTPS, giving you a maintenance-free, unhosted website at zero ongoing cost. Reuse your order history to re-import, tweak, and redeploy fast.
